zh.title: 瑞波币/美元技术分析：温和上行测试前高阻力
zh.content:
当前XRP/美元维持温和上行结构，价格稳步运行于1.20上方，持续逼近1.26前高区域，多头趋势仍占优势但动能略有放缓。

MACD维持在零轴上方并继续走扩，显示短期动能偏多；均线方面价格明显站上SMA20（1.19557），趋势支撑增强，但RSI缺失需观察。

下方支撑关注1.24-1.195区间，尤其SMA20为关键防守位；上方阻力集中在1.265前高，若突破或打开至1.30整数关口空间。

操作上建议回踩1.24附近分批布局多单，止损可设1.195下方；若放量突破1.265可顺势追多，但需防范冲高回落风险。

en.title: Ripple vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Price action in XRP/USD shows a short-term bullish bias, with price holding near 1.26288 after a 1.49% 24-hour gain. The market is pressing against recent highs at 1.26489, suggesting ongoing accumulation. Trading remains above the 20-period SMA at 1.19557, reinforcing a recovery structure from prior consolidation. Overall momentum favors buyers, though upside progress is becoming more gradual as price approaches resistance.

Momentum indicators, while partially unavailable, can be inferred from price behavior and MACD reading. The MACD value of 0.024087455 suggests bullish momentum remains active, with buyers maintaining control above the zero line. However, the absence of a signal line limits precise divergence analysis. Price stability near recent highs indicates reduced bearish pressure, though upward momentum appears to be gradually cooling as price compresses near resistance.

Immediate support is found at the SMA(20) near 1.19557, which also aligns with the broader short-term trend baseline. Intraday support sits at 1.24336, the recent low, while a psychological floor exists around 1.20. On the upside, resistance is established at 1.26489, with a breakout potentially opening room toward 1.28 and 1.30 if momentum strengthens and volume confirms continuation in the near term.

Short-term structure favors a cautiously bullish stance while price remains above the SMA(20). Traders may consider buying dips toward 1.20–1.23, with confirmation from support holding and MACD remaining positive. Risk management is essential, with stops below 1.19 to protect against breakdown. Upside targets include 1.265 and a potential extension toward 1.28–1.30 if breakout momentum sustains, though rejection at resistance could trigger consolidation.
